title: Décor Vacuum Insulated Food Flask, Stainless Steel Food Flask, Ideal for Coffee, Porridge, Soups, Leak-Proof, Durable & Reusable, Keeps Food Hot for 4 Hours & Cold 9 Hours, Mint or Pistachio 520ml
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: Up to 4 Hours Hot - Enjoy delicious homemade meals such as porridge, soups, stews and pasta while on the go; Recommended to fill with hot water before filling with food to retain heat better
Up to 9 Hours Cold - Not just for hot foods, the Décor food flask also keeps cold foods such as smoothie bowls, overnight oats and yoghurts cold for up to 9 hours
Airtight seal - preserves the freshness of your food and prevent leaks
Easy to Clean - Featuring a wide mouth and a large 520ml capacity which makes filling, eating and cleaning easy
Reusable & Durable - Décor have been making lives easier for over 60 years with homewares that are functional, affordable and made to last
